name: Chocolate Cream Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, flour, cocoa, and salt in a medium saucepan. Stir in milk.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture boils.
3. Remove from heat. Stir half of the mixture into the beaten egg yolks; return to the saucepan.
4. Continue cooking and stirring over medium heat until the mixture boils again. Boil and stir for 1 minute.
5. Remove from heat and stir in butter and vanilla. Allow to cool for 10 minutes, then pour into the pie shell.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Prepare meringue topping: In a small mixing bowl, beat egg whites and cream of tartar until foamy.
8. Gradually add sugar and beat until stiff peaks form.
9. Spread the meringue over the warm pie filling, carefully sealing to the edges of the crust.
10. Bake for 5 to 8 minutes, or just until the meringue is lightly browned.
11. Allow to cool to room temperature, then chill for several hours before serving. Store leftovers in the refrigerator.
